text: Fresh "FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #7 main-n258920-f0a15aafcb8: Sun Oct 30 09:44:53 CET 2022 arm64" built with "FreeBSD clang version 14.0.5 (https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project.git llvmorg-14.0.5-0-gc12386ae247c)" is not affected. At least I am no more able to reproduce this, so I am closing the bug.
